videos.headline: VA Tech punter makes a great save
videos.description: Virginia Tech long snapper Eddie D'Antuono snaps the ball over punter A.J. Hughes' head and into the end zone but Hughes recovers and kicks the ball away just before East Carolina tight end Stephen Baggett could get to it.
